ddls:
CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_color" TEXT /* Color of the route */,
  "route_grade" TEXT /* Grade of the route (e.g., 5.12d, V4) */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of route (e.g., Top Rope, Flash) */,
  "wall_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wall where the route is located */,
  "offset" REAL /* Offset of the route on the wall */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Average rating of the route */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the route (e.g., Top Rope, Flash, Attempt) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the route was created */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the route (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the route */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the route */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date of the route */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the route is currently active */,
  "video_link" TEXT /* Link to a video of the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_style FOREIGN KEY ("style") REFERENCES styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_route_grade FOREIGN KEY ("route_grade") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_wall_id FOREIGN KEY ("wall_id") REFERENCES walls ("wall_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "walls" (
  "wall_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wall */,
  "wall_name" TEXT /* Name of the wall */,
  "wall_type" TEXT /* Type of wall (e.g., boulders, island) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the wall */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the wall */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the wall within the gym */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material the wall is made of (e.g., wood, synthetic) */,
  "difficulty_levels" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of difficulty levels the wall can accommodate */,
  "last_inspected" TEXT /* Date the wall was last inspected for safety */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wall_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the grade (e.g., 5.12d, V4) */,
  "grade_description" TEXT /* Description of the grade */,
  "difficulty_rating" INTEGER /* Numeric value representing the difficulty level (e.g., 1-10) */,
  "recommended_for" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of user roles for whom the grade is recommended (e.g., beginner, intermediate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style (e.g., Top Rope, Flash) */,
  "style_description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  "equipment_needed" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of equipment needed for the style (e.g., rope, harness) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., climber, coach, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the gym */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Link to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climbs" (
  "climb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climb */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who climbed the route */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route being climbed */,
  "climb_date" TEXT /* Date of the climb */,
  "climb_time" TEXT /* Time of the climb */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the climb was successful */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempts made to complete the climb */,
  "injury_reported" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if any injury was reported during the climb */,
  "video_link" TEXT /* Link to a video of the climb */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("climb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climbs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climbs_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the comment */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route being commented on */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is featured */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the comment has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the comment has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment accompanying the rating */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the rating is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follows" (
  "follow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following */,
  "followed_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date the user started following another user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the follow (e.g., active, blocked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follows_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follows_followed_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("followed_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who unlocked the achievement */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "achievement_date" TEXT /* Date of the achievement */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points awarded for the achievement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard */,
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the achievement being ranked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being ranked */,
  "leaderboard_date" TEXT /* Date of the leaderboard */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the user in the leaderboard */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_achievement_id FOREIGN KEY ("achievement_id") REFERENCES achievements ("achievement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being recommended */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended route */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date of the recommendation */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the recommendation (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_recommendations_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wall_configurations" (
  "wall_configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "wall_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wall being configured */,
  "configuration_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "configuration_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date of the configuration */,
  "active_from" TEXT /* Date the configuration became active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wall_configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wall_configurations_wall_id FOREIGN KEY ("wall_id") REFERENCES walls ("wall_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_settings" (
  "route_setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route being set */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date of the setting */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_settings_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_settings_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hold_types" (
  "hold_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hold type */,
  "hold_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the hold type */,
  "hold_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the hold type */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material the hold is made of (e.g., wood, plastic) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the hold (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hold_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holds" (
  "hold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hold */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the hold is in */,
  "hold_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hold type */,
  "hold_position" TEXT /* Position of the hold in the route */,
  "last_inspected" TEXT /* Date the hold was last inspected for safety */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the hold (e.g., good, worn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holds_hold_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("hold_type_id") REFERENCES hold_types ("hold_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holds_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)
